name_en: 【Black Paris💯Five-Grid Embroidered Lady Dior】Lᴀᴅʏ Embroidered Lady Dior bag "Cʜʀɪsᴛɪᴀɴ Dɪᴏʀ" is stylish and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, it adds a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. It comes with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. The detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket, and patch pocket allow it to be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.
